text.title: iac-patterns-module-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for iac-patterns-module-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixes resources that change at different rates, making updates high-risk; impossible to test individual concerns in isolation.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Makes the module unusable in other environments; breaks the reuse contract. Parameterize instead.

failure-mode.description: Copy-pasting resource blocks instead of modularizing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Configuration drift is guaranteed — environments diverge silently over time. Extract repeated patterns to modules immediately.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: terraform-docs and IDE completions become useless; consumers can't determine output purpose without reading main.tf.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consumers pin to HEAD and silently receive breaking changes; there's no way to roll back a consumer without forking the module.
